feeds.title: The Mysticle
feeds.description:
In todays video our first focus is the Meta Pixel LocalHost Tracking controversy, specifically Meta's pause of Android tracking technology. This issue highlights ongoing privacy concerns related to Meta's data practices.

Further Meta-related topics include new Navigator features: the Seethrough Navigator functionality that dims the environment, and the Move With You Navigator feature. A notable point of discussion is the continued lack of support for these features on Xbox platforms.

Updates to Meta Horizon are also covered, featuring the introduction of Fish & Dog Avatars. Additionally, this report details leaks surrounding Meta Celeste, which involves future HUD glasses, their design, and associated EMG wristband and gesture technologies. The emerging Hypernova project is also addressed.

Environment leaks for Quest platforms are presented, including a Leaked Theater Environment for social VR and a New Plaza Environment. A persistent Power Menu Bug on Meta devices is also highlighted.

Broader industry discussions include the significant "Stop Killing Games" initiative, advocating against the discontinuation of video games. Finally, the video notes recent visual upgrades for Green Hell VR on Quest 3, enhancing its immersive experience.

I hope you enjoy this one :D

~~~~~~~~~~JOIN OUR DISCORD~~~~~~~~~~
https://discord.gg/NUqvaCz

~~~~~~~~~~AND REDDIT~~~~~~~~~~~
https://www.reddit.com/r/TheMysticle

feeds.title: AppleInsider
feeds.description:
Apple just announced AppleCare One, a brand-new way to protect all of your Apple devices under one simple, flexible, and affordable monthly plan. In this video, I’ll break down everything you need to know — including pricing, benefits, availability, and how it compares to AppleCare+.

💸 Starting at just $19.99/month, AppleCare One covers up to three devices — with the option to add more anytime for just $5.99/month per product. Whether it’s your iPhone, iPad, Mac, or Apple Watch, you now get full AppleCare+ protection with added perks, including:

✅ Unlimited accidental damage repairs
✅ 24/7 priority support from Apple experts
✅ Battery service at no extra cost
✅ NEW: Theft and Loss protection for iPad & Apple Watch
✅ Add devices you already own (up to 4 years old!)

Starting July 24th at 5 AM PT, U.S. customers can sign up for AppleCare One right from their iPhone, iPad, or Mac — or visit an Apple Store to enroll.

If you’re currently paying for multiple AppleCare+ plans, AppleCare One could save you money instantly while simplifying your support experience.
